snippet.title: Insurance price hikes are driven by inflation, says The Hartford CEO Christopher Swift
snippet.description:
Christopher Swift, The Hartford CEO, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk the impact of Hawaii's deadly wildfires on insurers, inflation driven price hikes and the labor market. For access to live and exclusive video from CNBC subscribe to CNBC PRO: https://cnb.cx/2NGeIvi
